name: Брадгар Дур-Молок
notes: Bradgar the Anvil, a dwarf captain of the Kragmir fighting club and the leader of its five champions. He fights in mithras full plate behind a tower shield, anchors the front, and steadies his allies with a battle cadence. He is slow, and very hard to move or to drop.

actions.name: Commander's Cadence
actions.text: An aura out to 30 feet. Allies within it, Bradgar included, gain a +1 status bonus to attack rolls and to saves against fear. It applies and clears on its own as tokens move.

actions.name: Knockdown
actions.text: Bradgar makes a warhammer Strike. On a hit he attempts a free Trip with Athletics +21.

actions.name: Reactive Strike
actions.text: Trigger a creature within reach uses a manipulate or move action, or leaves a square. Effect Bradgar makes a melee Strike against it.

actions.name: Shield Block
actions.text: Trigger Bradgar is hit by a physical attack. Effect his tower shield reduces the damage by 10 (Hardness 10).

actions.name: Rooted
actions.text: Bradgar gains a +2 circumstance bonus to defenses against forced movement and to his Athletics DC against Shove, Trip, and Reposition.
